model._hint: Fine-tune: SG161222/Realistic_Vision_V6.0_B1_noVAE (SD 1.5 base). IMPORTANT: This is the noVAE variant — must use with external VAE (stabilityai/sd-vae-ft-mse-original). Without it expect colour shifts. Recommended scheduler: DPM++ SDE Karras. ~2 GB; no sequential offload needed.

generation._hint: 25+ steps with DPM++ SDE Karras. 30 is a solid default for good quality. Reduce to 20 for quick drafts. | 7.0 safe default. Community range: 5–9. | 768×1024 for half-body portraits. 896×896 for face/bust shots. 640×1152 for full body. 512×512 for quick drafts.

system._hint: ~2 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (model fits in unified memory)

notes.about: Generates highly detailed photorealistic and hyperrealistic portraits and figures. Optimised for sharp skin detail, accurate anatomy, and natural lighting.
notes.prompt_guide:
No trigger word. Use photography-style descriptions. Examples: 'RAW photo, portrait of a young woman, natural light, shallow depth of field, 8k, ultra-detailed', 'cinematic photograph, full-body shot, model in an urban setting, golden hour', 'close-up face, photorealistic, studio lighting, high resolution'.

Negative prompt: Model card recommended: '(deformed iris, deformed pupils, semi-realistic, cgi, 3d, render, sketch, cartoon, drawing, anime), text, cropped, out of frame, worst quality, low quality, jpeg artifacts, ugly, duplicate, morbid, mutilated, extra fingers, mutated hands, poorly drawn hands, poorly drawn face, mutation, deformed, blurry, dehydrated, bad anatomy, bad proportions, extra limbs, cloned face, disfigured, gross proportions, malformed limbs, missing arms, missing legs, extra arms, extra legs, fused fingers, too many fingers, long neck'.
